title: Add Year field to wine form, display uploaded logo in page header and PDF

requirements.text: Add a 'Year' (vintage year) numeric input field to the Add/Edit Wine modal form (frontend/src/components/WineFormModal.tsx). The field should be optional, accept a 4-digit year (e.g. 2023), and be placed after the Wine Name field and before the Wine Style field. It must be included in the WineFormData interface and sent as part of the form submission payload.

quotes: we also need to add the option for the yera in the wine add ox

acceptanceCriteria: A 'Year' input field appears in the Add/Edit Wine modal form
The field is optional (not required for form submission)
The field accepts a 4-digit year value
The field is positioned after the Wine Name field and before the Wine Style field
The Year value is included in the form submission payload
When editing an existing wine, the Year field is pre-populated with the stored value

requirements.text: Add a 'year' optional field (nullable text or Nat) to the Wine data model in backend/main.mo. Update the addWine and updateWine function signatures to accept this field, and ensure getAllWines returns it. Default value must be null/empty for existing wines.

quotes: we also need to add the option for the yera in the wine add ox

acceptanceCriteria: The Wine record type in backend/main.mo includes a 'year' field (optional/nullable)
addWine accepts the year field
updateWine accepts and stores the year field
getAllWines returns the year field for each wine
Existing wines without a year default to null/empty without data loss

requirements.text: Update the frontend wine query hooks in frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts to include the 'year' field when calling addWine and updateWine, and to read it from getAllWines results. Also display the Year value in the wine list table (frontend/src/components/WineTable.tsx) as part of the Wine Name column (e.g. appended in parentheses or as a small label), if present.

quotes: we also need to add the option for the yera in the wine add ox

acceptanceCriteria: useQueries.ts passes the year field to addWine and updateWine backend calls
The year value returned by getAllWines is read and surfaced in the UI
The Year is displayed in the wine list table alongside the Wine Name when present
Wines without a year display normally without errors

requirements.text: Update the page header (frontend/src/components/PageHeader.tsx) to display the newly generated uploaded-style logo image (a wine glass illustration with grape cluster and 'NATURA VINI' wordmark). The logo image must be stored as frontend/public/assets/generated/naturavini-logo-v2.png and rendered in the header. If image generation fails or the image cannot be loaded, fall back gracefully to the existing logo or plain text.

quotes: can you please add up this logo also in the page and pdf file

acceptanceCriteria: The page header displays the new logo image
The logo image is served from frontend/public/assets/generated/
If the logo fails to load, the header does not break — it falls back gracefully
The logo is visually prominent and consistent with the Naturavini brand theme

requirements.text: Update the PDF export in frontend/src/components/WineTable.tsx to use the new logo image (frontend/public/assets/generated/naturavini-logo-v2.png) at the top of the exported PDF. If the logo image cannot be loaded at PDF generation time, skip rendering the logo in the PDF rather than throwing an error.

quotes: can you please add up this logo also in the page and pdf file

acceptanceCriteria: The exported PDF displays the new Natura Vini logo at the top
If the logo image fails to load, the PDF is still generated without the logo (no crash)
The logo placement and sizing in the PDF is consistent with the brand's visual identity

requirements.text: Update the PDF export in frontend/src/components/WineTable.tsx to include the 'Year' column in the exported wine catalogue table, placed after the Wine Name column. If a wine has no year value, the cell should display a dash (—).

quotes: we also need to add the option for the yera in the wine add ox

acceptanceCriteria: The exported PDF includes a 'Year' column after the Wine Name column
Wines with a year value display it in the Year column
Wines without a year value show a dash (—) in the Year column

constraints: If the new logo image cannot be loaded in the PDF, skip it gracefully — do not throw an error or break the export
The 'year' field must be optional/nullable in the backend to avoid breaking existing wine records
Do not modify any files under frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, or frontend/src/components/ui
nonGoals: Changing the existing wine style options or other existing form fields
Redesigning the overall page layout or visual theme

required: Premium wine brand logo featuring a wine glass illustration with a grape cluster, bold 'NATURA VINI' wordmark in dark purple or deep burgundy, clean white background, elegant serif typography (naturavini-logo-v2.dim_400x200.png)
